name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical locations across the U.S. and online lending options.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates as a multi-service financial company providing emergency cash solutions and related financial services. The company has maintained a nationwide network of physical store locations, though some are periodically affected by circumstances (such as Hurricane Ida temporary closures mentioned on their site). They serve consumers who need immediate access to cash and other financial services outside traditional banking channels.

The company offers a diverse portfolio of financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, business services, and tax services. They also provide online lending options and a card product line. Their website indicates they operate location-based services while maintaining online loan capabilities, suggesting a hybrid retail-and-digital model. Customer service is available through multiple channels including phone and email support dedicated to both general and online loan inquiries.

ACE Cash Express differentiates itself through the breadth of services offered under one brand—combining emergency lending with ancillary financial services like check cashing, bill payment, and money transfers. This positions them as a comprehensive alternative financial services provider rather than a single-product lender. They demonstrate awareness of regulatory requirements, including specific notice requirements for California residents regarding data collection and use.

The company operates in a regulated lending space where product availability varies significantly by state (as evidenced by the "this type of loan is not available in this state" messages on their site). Consumers should verify which specific products are available in their state before applying. While the breadth of services is notable, ACE operates as a traditional payday/title lender and should be approached with the same caution as other high-cost emergency lending options.
address: 1120 W Camp Wisdom Rd, Dallas, TX 75232

company_info.headquarters: 1120 W Camp Wisdom Rd, Dallas, TX 75232

pros: Offers multiple financial services under one brand (loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Provides both in-store and online lending options for accessibility
Multiple contact methods for customer service (phone and dedicated email for different inquiry types)
Installment loans available in addition to traditional payday products
Title loans available for customers with vehicle collateral
Established nationwide location network for physical accessibility
Business services and money transfer capabilities alongside consumer lending
cons: Product availability varies significantly by state with no transparency on their website about which products are available where
As an emergency cash lender, likely carries high interest rates typical of the payday lending industry (rates not disclosed on website)
Website navigation issues and 404 errors on location-specific pages suggest outdated or poorly maintained digital infrastructure
Limited transparency on terms, rates, and fees visible on the public website
Emergency lending products typically involve short repayment cycles that can trap consumers in debt cycles
best_for: Consumers in immediate financial emergencies needing same-day or next-day cash access
Vehicle owners who need quick collateral-based loans via title lending
Customers who prefer in-person interaction and want to use local physical store locations
Users needing bundled financial services beyond lending (check cashing, bill payments, money transfers)
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who have access to a physical location or prefer online lending, and who have exhausted other options. The primary caveat is that emergency lending through ACE—like all payday and title lenders—typically carries high costs and short repayment terms; consumers should explore credit unions, employer advances, or non-profit credit counseling first, and only use ACE as a last resort given the high-cost nature of these products.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
